mission: Finish Capsule v1 and v2 as a production-grade OSS runtime adapter/control-plane SDK.

tasks.title: Harden adapter contract tests for every provider package
successCriteria: Each adapter package has focused capability and receipt tests
Unsupported capability behavior is covered by reusable contract helpers
pnpm test passes without live credentials

tasks.title: Add live integration test gates for real providers
successCriteria: Live tests are skipped by default
Each live test requires explicit CAPSULE_LIVE_TESTS=1 plus provider credentials
Live tests create disposable resources and tear them down

tasks.title: Finish real lifecycle operations for deployed resources
successCriteria: Service delete/status/logs are implemented where provider APIs support them
Job status/cancel/logs are implemented where provider APIs support them
Capabilities stay honest when operations remain unsupported

tasks.title: Replace mock-first examples with real-adapter examples gated by env vars
successCriteria: Examples default to safe mock mode when credentials are absent
Examples can run against real adapters when provider env vars are set
README explains exactly which examples call real APIs

tasks.title: Implement real preview environment composition
successCriteria: Preview creation can compose database branch, service or edge deploy, and check job
Preview cleanup records receipts for every resource
Failure handling preserves enough evidence for cleanup and debugging

tasks.title: Add release and publishing infrastructure
successCriteria: GitHub Actions runs typecheck, tests, and build
Package publishing configuration is explicit
Release notes can identify changed packages

tasks.title: Add missing roadmap adapters for Fly Machines and Azure Container Apps
successCriteria: Fly adapter covers machine.create and one-shot job execution
Azure Container Apps adapter covers job.run and service.deploy
Docs and CLI list the new providers honestly

tasks.title: Strengthen policy and receipt security posture
successCriteria: Secret redaction has focused tests across stdout, stderr, and logs
Receipts include enforcement notes for delegated, best-effort, and unsupported policy
No adapter logs raw provider credentials or secret values
